creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
>>>>> "PF" == Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net> writes:

PF> Sure it does:


PF> What is the output of 'make all-depends-list' for you?


# make all-depends-list
/usr/ports/devel/gettext
/usr/ports/devel/gmake
/usr/ports/devel/libtool
/usr/ports/x11/XFree86

But it doesn't list XFree86 as a run-time dependency in the installed
package:

# pkg_info -r rdesktop-1.0.0.p19.7.6
Information for rdesktop-1.0.0.p19.7.6:

Depends on:


also, 
# ident Makefile
Makefile:
     $FreeBSD: ports/net/rdesktop/Makefile,v 1.8 2001/12/17 03:43:00 dwcjr Exp $


which seems to be the latest in ports.
